tags.name: `mc-button-group-item`
tags.description:
A customizable button group item component that is designed to be used within an `mc-button-group`.
Category: Forms, Content Display
Purpose: The button group item is supposed to be used and repeated inside an `mc-button-group`.
When to use: Related actions, Toggle options, Navigation between views
When not to use: Single actions, Non-related buttons
Works with components: mc-button-group
Alternative component names: Button Set Item, Action Group Item, Toggle Group Item

Events:

  * `focus` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button receives focus.

  * `blur` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button loses focus.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where main label goes.

  * `sublabel` {} - The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `trailingicon` {} - The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

Attributes:

  * `variant` {`IMcButtonGroupItemVariant`} - The variant of the button group item. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

  * `selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of the button when selected. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

Properties:

  * `selected` {`boolean`} - The selected state of the button group item.

  * `variant` {`IMcButtonGroupItemVariant`} - The variant of the button group item. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

  * `selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of the button when selected. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
`variant` {`IMcButtonGroupItemVariant`} - The variant of the button group item. Possible values are 'bordered', 'borderless', and 'rounded'.

Property: variant

Default: bordered

attributes.name: selectedappearance
attributes.description:
`selectedappearance` {`"primary" | "neutral"`} - The appearance of the button when selected. Possible values are 'primary' and 'neutral'.

Property: selectedappearance

Default: primary

attributes.name: onfocus
attributes.description: `focus` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button receives focus.

attributes.name: onblur
attributes.description: `blur` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button loses focus.
